# Burger Rox

> Crave-worthy homemade burgers with our signature blaze sauce. Order online for delivery in Mamurdi, Kiwale, Punawale & Ravet (Pune). Open daily 7 PM – 10 PM.

Burger Rox is a Pune-based burger restaurant run by a brother-sister duo. We deliver within a 12 km radius of Urban Forest, Kiwale. Minimum order ₹149 for delivery. Free delivery within 3 km. Payments via Razorpay (UPI/cards) and Cash on Delivery.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand intro, hero, social proof, featured menu, contact.
- [Menu](/menu): Full menu — burgers, fries, combos, desserts. Prices from ₹79.
- [Delivery Area](/delivery-area): Coverage zones and distance-based delivery charges.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we collect and use customer data.
- [Refund Policy](/refund-policy): Cancellation window and refund process via Razorpay.
- [Terms & Conditions](/terms): Ordering, delivery, and payment terms.

## Blog

- [Best Burgers in Mamurdi & Ravet](/blog/best-burgers-mamurdi-ravet): Local guide to the best burgers in Mamurdi, Ravet, Punawale & Kiwale, and why Burger Rox leads.

## Contact

- WhatsApp / Phone: +91 9321389985
